notes: Kramer's own product page (kramerav.com) returned HTTP 403. Specs sourced from AV-iQ, avlgear.com, and ManualsLib. HDMI version not explicitly stated; hdmi-2.0 inferred from 4K@60Hz (4:2:0) support and 8.91 Gbps max data rate. Power current draw varies across sources (500mA vs 730mA). S/PDIF output is coaxial RCA (not optical/TOSLINK). Desktop unit — not rack-mountable (optional RK-3T rack adapter available separately).

ports.name: HDMI In
ports.note: HDMI version inferred from 4K@60Hz (4:2:0) / 8.91 Gbps spec; not explicitly stated as HDMI 2.0

ports.name: HDMI Out
ports.note: HDMI version inferred from 4K@60Hz (4:2:0) / 8.91 Gbps spec; not explicitly stated as HDMI 2.0

ports.name: Analog Audio In
ports.note: Unbalanced stereo analog audio input on 3.5mm mini jack

ports.name: Analog Audio Out
ports.note: Unbalanced stereo analog audio output on 3.5mm mini jack

ports.name: S/PDIF Out
ports.note: S/PDIF digital audio output on RCA connector; de-embeds from HDMI input or ARC

ports.name: 5V DC
ports.note: 5V DC, 500–730mA (sources vary); external power adapter included (model RK-3T optional rack adapter)
